title: Law does not criminalise heartbreak: Karnataka High Court quashes rape on false promise to marry case
description: The Karnataka High Court recently quashed a rape complaint filed by a woman against a man, reiterating that consensual relationships between adults cannot be retroactively criminalised.Justice M Nagaprasanna said, "Where two adults of their own volition, engage in consensual sexual relation over a sustained period, the subsequent refusal of the man to marry the woman, howsoever regrettable, does not, ipso facto, transmute such intimacy into the offence of rape as punishable under Section 376 of
